<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get organization's info by its ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/organizations/{organization_id}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves details about a specific organization, including quotas and consumption statistics.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"organization_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"simple"}]}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
